rulings.Case Title: DOREEN JULIE BENETTI INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al VS. ALLIS-CHALMERS CORPORATION PRODUCT LIABILITY TRUST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Metalclad Insulation Corporation To (1) Comply With The Courts Prior Discovery Order; (2) Provide Further Substantive Responses; And (3) For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, May 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. PLAINTIFFs DOREEN BENNETT, JEANNIE BENETTI, DOREEN BENETTI's Motion for order compelling Metalclad Insulation Corporation to (1) comply with the court's prior discovery order; (2) provide further substantive responses; and for sanctions, granted in part, denied in part, as follows: 1. As to Request for Production of Documents, set one, no. 5, granted. The objections set forth defendant's supplemental response are overruled, and ordered stricken. Defendant shall serve a verified supplemental response covering the period 1967 through 1977, as previously ordered; and using the definition of "entity" suggested by plaintiff in this motion. 2. As to Special Interrogatories: a. No. 2, granted. The objections set forth defendant's supplemental response are overruled, and ordered stricken. Defendant shall serve a verified supplemental response setting forth with specificity the nature of the investigations [as defined in the original interrogatory] performed by defendant, b. No. 3, granted. The objections set forth defendant's supplemental response are overruled, and ordered stricken. Within seven days of the date of this order, defendant shall serve a verified supplemental response setting forth those retention policies it has implemented, as referenced in its supplemental response. c. No. 17, hearing required. 3. As to Form Interrogatories (set one), no. 17.1, hearing required; 4. Any response required by this order shall be served within ten days of notice of entry of this order. = (220/PS)

rulings.Case Title: DOREEN JULIE BENETTI INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al VS. ALLIS-CHALMERS CORPORATION PRODUCT LIABILITY TRUST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For A Protective Order Re Plaintiffs' Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, May 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation¿s motion for a protective order re: plaintiffs¿ second sets of special interrogatories and request for production of documents, is granted in part and denied in part. Metalclad shall provide substantive responses to interrogatories 41-42 within 30 days. Metalclad shall provide substantive responses to interrogatories 43-62 and requests 1-3 within 30 days; however, as to Mr. Benetti¿s employment by the US Navy, the responses are limited only to the Long Beach Naval Shipyard, the San Diego Naval Shipyard, and the National Steel and Shipbuilding Company. The protective order is granted as to interrogatories 63-64 and requests 16-17 without prejudice to plaintiffs requesting transcripts of depositions of specific individuals. Metalclad shall provide substantive responses to interrogatories 65-68 and requests 14-15 within 30 days. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JAY WARREN CALHOUN et al VS. ASBESTO DEFENDANTS B*P AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Union Carbide Corporation Compelling Compliance And Requesting Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, May 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Union Carbide Corporation¿s motion compelling compliance is granted. No opposition was filed. Union Carbide is awarded $500 in sanctions. = (220/HEK)
